improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your operations. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners, traders, and professionals. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Professional trade and business support powered by Claude. Try Gideon free today.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the page is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. Including the free searches offer in descriptions creates immediate interest and lowers perceived risk for new visitors.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a professional workspace built for business owners and traders. Try three free searches today.
improvements.rationale: This headline clearly names the product (Gideon), states exactly what it does (AI trade and business assistant), and immediately communicates the core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace). The subheading reinforces the target audience and ends with a low-friction CTA highlighting the free trial, reducing hesitation for first-time visitors.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's full capabilities—including voice chat, your personal workspace, and professional trade and business support. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the conversion point where free users hit the paywall. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and key benefits, it reduces friction and uncertainty at the critical decision moment, improving conversion rates.
